title: Wave 27 - Manager property form parity expansion
description: Coordinate Wave 27 delivery for manager property form parity: expand create/edit contract, preserve session and role guardrails, and align detail/editor flows with richer CRM property data.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 27 roadmap includes architect/backend/mobile/qa sequencing and PR strategy
Epic definition captures manager property form parity objective and rollout guardrails
Cross-wave dependencies from manager dashboard, property detail, and login/session flows are tracked
